title: Japan and China foreign ministers hold first contact after deterioration of ties
summary: The meetings aim to restore diplomatic communication after the worsening of bilateral relations.

title: UNESCO recommends Japan improve historical exhibition at Sado gold mine
summary: The World Heritage Committee requests additional measures to ensure accurate representation of the site.

title: Two men die after falling into pond while cutting grass in Wakayama
summary: The victims, aged 70 and 80, were found dead in the agricultural pond.

title: Former tennis champion arrested for alleged romance scam in Japan
summary: Rika Hiraki, mixed doubles champion at Roland Garros, accused of defrauding woman of 300,000 yen.

title: US and Saudi Arabia sign nuclear agreement allowing uranium enrichment
summary: The pact raises concerns about nuclear proliferation in the Middle East.

title: Fire in Osaka leaves two sisters dead in burned home
summary: The bodies of the women, aged 50 and 60, were found after the fire in Katano.

title: High school student drowns in river in Kochi
summary: The minor was swept away by current while swimming with friends in Kagami River.

title: 10 years after Yamayuri massacre, ableism remains a challenge
summary: The crime that took the lives of 19 people with disabilities continues to shape the fight against discrimination.

title: Japan Post considers reducing working hours, expanding midday closures
summary: The postal company seeks to improve efficiency with no-service days and 1,000 more offices with midday break.

title: Japanese government raises gasoline subsidy to 16.9 yen to curb price
summary: The measure aims to keep fuel costs around 170 yen amid international volatility.

title: Hamamatsu breaks record with 41.1°C on third consecutive day of extreme heat
summary: Authorities issue heat stroke alerts in several regions of Japan.

title: First permanent housing delivered to victims of Noto earthquake
summary: Fourteen rebuilt homes in Noto peninsula aim to prevent social isolation of those affected.

title: Three minors to be tried as adults for murder and robbery in Tochigi
summary: Court orders trial of 16-year-old adolescents accused of killing man during robbery.
